subject: Sports
title: The Transfer Market
description: A short lesson to help you apply The Transfer Market.

hook.text: In 2017, Paris Saint-Germain paid 222 million euros for one player. Football had entered a new era.

buildup.text: The transfer market is how clubs buy and sell players. Fees have exploded since the 1990s.

discovery.text: Neymar's move from Barcelona to PSG doubled the world transfer record overnight.

twist.text: Financial Fair Play rules were supposed to prevent overspending. State-owned clubs found loopholes instead.

climax.text: Transfer fees now exceed a billion euros per window for the top leagues combined.

punchline.text: Players cost more than some companies. That's modern football.

quiz.question: How much did PSG pay for Neymar in 2017?
